onboarding.header.title: Set up your profile
onboarding.header.subtitle: A few steps so we can match you with mentors.
onboarding.import.title: Import your profile
onboarding.import.desc: Upload a performance review or CV (.docx or .pdf). We pre-fill your profile — edit anything before saving.
onboarding.import.drop: Drop a file or click to browse
onboarding.import.error: Could not read that file. Try another format or skip to enter manually.
onboarding.background.title: Your background
onboarding.background.desc: Tell us about your current role and experience. This helps us find relevant matches.
onboarding.fields.bioPlaceholder: A sentence about you, your interests, or what drives you.
onboarding.teach.title: What you can teach
onboarding.teach.desc: What topics could you help a colleague with based on your experience? For each skill, you can optionally add an example project that shows you've done it.
onboarding.teach.placeholder: e.g. React, system design, financial modeling…
onboarding.teach.aria: Add a skill you can teach
onboarding.teach.empty: Add at least one skill to get better matches. You can always update this later.
onboarding.learn.title: What you want to learn
onboarding.learn.desc: What skills or areas do you want to develop in the next 6–12 months? Type a skill and press Enter.
onboarding.learn.placeholder: e.g. leadership, Python, SEO, project management…
onboarding.learn.aria: Add a skill you want to learn
onboarding.learn.shadowLabel: If you could spend a day shadowing someone in a completely different role, what would that role look like?
onboarding.learn.shadowPlaceholder: A few sentences is plenty. Only you will see this.
onboarding.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
